# Moveroo Australia

> Moveroo helps Australians compare and coordinate household moves, interstate removals and vehicle transport through suitable removalist and transport providers.

## About Moveroo

Moveroo helps Australians coordinate home moves and vehicle transport across the country. We collect the details that affect the job, compare suitable options and explain the next steps before booking.

## Services

### Household Removals
Professional moving support for homes and apartments. Get a quote for your route, timing, inventory and access needs.

- Interstate moving
- Local removals
- Packing services
- Storage solutions

### Removals and Storage
Moving and storage support when pickup, settlement, lease and redelivery dates do not line up. Moveroo can help check storage options through removalists or storage partners where provider fit supports it.

- Storage between pickup and redelivery
- Self-storage guidance when customers need access to stored items
- Settlement, rental key handback and staged delivery timing

### Interstate Removalists
Interstate removalist coordination for moves where dates, inventory, access and timing constraints need to be checked before booking.

- Backload option or dedicated move comparison
- Rental key handback and settlement-date planning
- Storage access and delayed delivery notes
- Household move plus vehicle timing where needed

### Combined Household + Vehicle Relocation
Planning support when a home move also includes a car, motorcycle or extra vehicle. Tell Moveroo when the household move and vehicle transport belong to the same relocation so timing, access and handoffs can be coordinated together.

- Household move plus vehicle transport
- Settlement and access timing
- Staged pickup and delivery planning
- One coordinated brief for multiple moving parts

### Vehicle Transport
Vehicle transport coordination across Australia. Whether you're moving interstate or buying a car from another city, we help match the job to a suitable transport option.

- Interstate car transport
- Car transport
- Door-to-door and depot-to-depot option comparison
- Motorcycle transport
- Boat transport
- Enclosed transport options

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How do I get a moving quote?
Visit our [quote page](https://quotes.moveroo.com.au/quote/household) and enter your move details. We'll review the route, timing, inventory and service needs so the quote can reflect the actual job.

### Do you transport vehicles interstate?
Yes, we offer vehicle transport services across all Australian states and territories. Get a [vehicle transport quote](https://quotes.moveroo.com.au/quote/vehicle) to see pricing.

### How do you choose transport partners?
Moveroo works with moving and transport partners that fit the job type, route, timing and service needs. We review partner suitability and can explain the planned service before booking.

### What areas do you service?
We service all major cities and regional areas across Australia, including Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide, Hobart, Darwin, and Canberra.
